summary: This sales brochure targets private clinics in Spain, highlighting clinical adherence metrics and AI agent capabilities for patient follow-up. It includes a sample dialogue script, security compliance details such as ISO 13485 and AES-256 encryption, and contact information for the sales representative. The material emphasizes data privacy and the non-medical advisory role of the AI system.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/4. Sales/4. Sales Materials/6. Brochures/Brochure Clínicas Privadas España.pptx
sniff_test_notes: ISO 13845 cited in Slide 1 vs ISO 13485 in Slide 5; target market is Spain despite UK NHS focus.
